testcase.name: src/a.py:10 [us_ssn]
testcase.failure: file: src/a.py line: 10 category: ssn confidence: 0.95 remediation: Replace with a synthetic SSN from the reserved 999 range.

testcase.name: src/a.py:42 [email_address]
testcase.failure: file: src/a.py line: 42 category: email confidence: 0.75 remediation: Use an example.com address from the RFC 2606 reserved list.

testcase.name: src/b.py:5 [phone_number]
testcase.failure: file: src/b.py line: 5 category: phone confidence: 0.65 remediation: Use a 555-0100 through 555-0199 fictional phone number.
